name: Honey Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together 3/4 cup of the honey and shortening.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine the remaining 1/2 cup honey with the pumpkin puree and add to the egg mixture.
4. Stir together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
5. Gradually stir the flour blend into the pumpkin mixture.
6. Fold in raisins and chopped nuts.
7. Chill the batter for 30 minutes.
8. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Yield: Approximately 4 dozen cookies.
Note: For a spicier cookie, substitute canned pumpkin pie filling for the plain pumpkin puree.
